description_long: This object is an abstract, highly stylized representation of a human figure, composed of elongated, angular elements that suggest limbs and a torso. The form is constructed from thin, rod-like structures that intersect and extend outward, evoking the dynamic motion of a pedestrian in stride. The main body appears to be a vertical shaft, with several sharp, linear appendages radiating from it, mimicking arms and legs in exaggerated motion. The surfaces are smooth and feature a mix of metallic and matte finishes, with a combination of reddish-brown and silvery-gray tones. The overall silhouette is slender and open, with significant negative space between the elements, giving the figure a sense of lightness and movement. This artistic interpretation is more sculptural than realistic, emphasizing form and gesture over anatomical detail.
description: A highly abstract, angular sculpture of a pedestrian adult, composed of elongated metallic rods in dynamic, striding poses with open, airy structure.
description_view_0: This view highlights the intersecting rods forming the upper body and limbs, with the main vertical shaft and several angular extensions visible.
description_view_1: The side angle emphasizes the length and thinness of the appendages, with the reddish-brown and silvery rods extending outward and upward.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the dynamic sweep of the limbs and the open, airy structure, with the main shaft and appendages clearly separated.
description_view_3: The view from below accentuates the negative space and the angular, splayed arrangement of the rods, giving a sense of movement.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract stylized form with no discernible clothing
